title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at AU Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at AU Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with AU Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About AU Small Finance Bank:
AU Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank!
